name: Rarity (Pony)
description:
Art: Rarity Blender 2.81 by AnimatorCorner on DeviantArt
https://www.deviantart.com/animatorcorner/art/Rarity-Blender-2-81-824609728

You enter the Carousel Boutique and meet rarity. You go visit Rainbow dash, from my Little Pony 'Friendship is Magic', in the Cloudominium where her Home resides.
